items.t: Nvidia’s Huang Courts Japanese AI Suppliers With Pork Skewers
items.d: On Wednesday night, Jensen Huang was in Tokyo’s central Kanda district courting the little-known Japanese suppliers that underpin the AI supply chain.
items.takeaway: 일본 AI 공급업체와 협력 강화로 엔비디아와 AI 생태계 확대

items.t: Nvidia’s Huang Says Vera Rubin on Track Despite Delay Talk
items.d: Nvidia Corp. co-founder Jensen Huang stressed that the US company’s next-generation AI accelerator systems were in production and on track for delivery to customers, responding to reports that manufacturing snags may delay their rollout.
items.takeaway: Vera Rubin 프로젝트 진행 상황을 긍정적으로 언급해 엔비디아 성장 기대감 유지
